title: Clear Water/Lava/PowderSnow
description: Clears the view while in any liquid e.g. water, lava and powder snow, so you are able to see through which is useful in PvP fights or similar.
body:
![Clear Fluids Water Lava Powder Snow title](https://i.postimg.cc/FKnJ4MKr/title.png)


### This Mod clears Lava, Water and Powder Snow so you can see, where you're swimming to!

![clear lava example](https://i.postimg.cc/vZvwGL6j/clear-lava.png)

![example of clear water](https://i.postimg.cc/Qd5NrTXK/clear-water.png)

It clears the fog when in fluids, which helps in pvp fights or recovering a friend who fell in lava.
